stemHtml: Following detection of a slow decompression and the automatic deployment of the oxygen masks from the passenger service units in the cabin, the first actions to be performed by cabin crew are to…

options.a: don the nearest oxygen mask and alert the commander.
options.b: walk up and down the cabin checking that the passengers are using the masks correctly.
options.c: seek help from other cabin crew members to manually release any masks that have not dropped.
options.d: return to the crew station and alert the senior cabin crew member.
